chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter 03-29 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It includes announcements about academic deadlines, upcoming events, and opportunities such as research positions and internships. Students are encouraged to stay informed about department news and resources available to support their studies and career development.

The newsletter covers important academic deadlines, including registration periods, exam schedules, and project submission dates. It also highlights events like workshops, seminars, and networking sessions organized by the department or student groups. These events aim to enhance learning, provide professional development, and foster community among EECS students. Regular updates help students plan their semester effectively and take advantage of available opportunities.

Opportunities featured in the newsletter include research assistant positions, internships with industry partners, and scholarships. The department collaborates with companies and research labs to offer hands-on experience and financial support. Students can apply through the provided links or contact advisors for guidance. Staying updated through the newsletter helps students access these resources and advance their academic and professional goals in EECS.
